title: Luxury Gardenia Candles Gifts for Women & Men Infused with Lapis Lazuli Crystals and Flowers | Aromatherapy Christmas Gifts | 60 Hrs (Gardenia/Lapis Lazuli, 10 OZ)
features: 🌸 Enchanting Gardenia Aroma – Elegant floral fragrance that transforms any space into a tranquil sanctuary.
💎 Genuine Lapis Lazuli Infusion – Each candle features authentic lapis lazuli crystals, promoting inner peace, clarity, and spiritual healing
🕯 Clean‑Burning Soy Wax – Crafted from a natural soy wax blend for longer, eco-conscious burn and a clean, soot-free glow.
🎁 Luxury Presentation & Keepsake – Packaged beautifully and includes a card detailing the crystal’s healing properties—ideal for gifting or self-care rituals.
🛁 Relaxation & Aromatherapy – Designed to calm the senses and support relaxation, good sleep, and mindful serenity.
💝 Ideal Gift – Elegant self-care and home décor present for Christmas, birthdays, Mother’s Day, or wellness rituals.
⏳ Burns for up to ~60 hours – filling your home with delicate floral aroma
description: Product Description Our Mission Lia Chahla London We are a small business based in a small town in England. Our mission is to make people feel happy, feel loved and feel better about themselves through the healing properties of natural crystals and the soothing aromas of our candles and soaps. We aim to create an atmosphere of happiness, love, and self-confidence, where people can find joy, rejuvenation, and a greater sense of well-being.
